title: Meituan open-sources LongCat-2.0, a large agentic coding model trained on Chinese chips
friendlyTitle: Meituan releases a big coding AI model
summary: VentureBeat reported that Meituan unveiled LongCat-2.0, a 1.6T-parameter mixture-of-experts model focused on agentic coding and trained on domestic Chinese ASICs. The model had reportedly appeared anonymously as Owl Alpha on OpenRouter before disclosure.
friendlySummary: Meituan has announced LongCat-2.0, a large model for coding agents, reportedly trained on Chinese-made chips.
whyItMatters: The release points to two practical shifts: open coding models are becoming stronger, and frontier-scale training may be less tied to Nvidia hardware than many buyers assumed. That could increase model choice and price pressure for developer tooling.
friendlyWhyItMatters: More strong coding models can give developers and companies more choices and may lower costs over time.
